generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder measuring shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxSecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder placed behind the gearwheel gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance EncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder, GearboxSecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data traces
instance InputCurrentTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live trace of motor input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance OutputAngleTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Encoder‑derived output angle of the axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance DerivedTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque τ calculated from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance AngularVelocityTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity ω derived from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance AngularAccelerationTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration α derived from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker streaming live sensor data to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
                     VisualizationService,
                     ParameterCalibrationService,
                     TraceComparisonService
]

instance SimulinkFrictionIdentificationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink runtime executing friction identification models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
                     ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom visualization dashboard for operator decision support"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService,
                     TraceComparisonService
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLAxisStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagram of the axis, motor and gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of Coulomb‑Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionIdentificationEngine
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time friction identification (static, kinetic, viscous) using combined white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides IdentifiedFrictionParametersInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured and simulated data in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAnalysisInsight,
                     DisplayDashboardAction
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑based parameter calibration for improved motion‑control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControllerParametersAction
]

instance TraceComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated versus measured traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComparisonResultInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance IdentifiedFrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous coefficients) identified in real time"
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation analysis between measured and simulated data for operator decision support"
]

instance ComparisonResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of comparison between simulated and measured traces"
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateControllerParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed back identified friction parameters to the SINUMERIK 840D controller to improve motion‑control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DisplayDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Show measured and simulated data on the custom visualization dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow functions as a passive, one‑way data consumer and does not send commands or data back to the physical robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time acquisition and processing of sensor streams; the digital shadow updates its data traces at the same rate as the MQTT sensor feed (unspecified frequency)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow composed of a Purpose (FrictionDerivation), an Asset (the first axis), Sources (sensor streams), Processing components (simulation models), Models (engineering, data‑calculation and simulation), and DataTraces/DataPoints that together provide friction insight and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated stage (runtime) of the robot, augmented by engineering models that represent the designed structure of the axis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of every data point to its source and processing model; comparison of simulated friction‑free and friction‑included traces against measured data; continuous re‑identification of white‑box and black‑box friction parameters to maintain model validity over wear and changing operating conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT publish/subscribe protocol; models and metadata are encapsulated in Asset Administration Shells."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shells (Industry 4.0 standard) and SysML modeling language; integration of standard communication via MQTT."
]
